name: Darcy Slipper Chair Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Upholstered, Hardwood Frame, Spot Clean, 250lbs Capacity
description: This Christopher Knight Home Darcy Brown Leather Slipper Chair is upholstered in smooth brown bonded leather and stands on brown wooden legs. Its size, simplicity and stylish design make this piece prefect for any small space. Place it in your office as an extra spot to sit, or put it in your bedroom to create a quiet spot to relax and read a favorite book. No matter where you place this Christopher Knight Home Darcy Brown Leather Slipper Chair you will love this purchase.
